title: Legal Information Services * AIDS/HIV Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Legal & Public Safety > Legal Information Services * AIDS/HIV Issues 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter AIDS/HIV Issues LGBTQ2+ Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF LAMBDA LEGAL LEGAL HELP DESK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information and resources regarding discrimination related to sexual orientation, gender identity and expression, and HIV status; inquiries are kept confidential. Assistance may include follow-up discussions with Lambda Legal attorneys or contact information for an attorney in the area or for other organizations that may directly assist. The Help Desk cannot provide legal advice. 120 Wall Street 19th Floor New York, NY 100053919 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email (213) 382-7600 Get Directions Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
